dashboard_recap.headline: MLB Daily Recap - May 05, 2026
dashboard_recap.article:
**MLB Recap: Big Hitters Shine on Day of Dominant Performances**

A trio of players delivered explosive performances on the diamond, leading their teams to victories in their respective matchups. In a 10-3 win for the Boston Red Sox, Ceddanne Rafaela crushed three hits, including a home run and four RBIs, to pace the offense. Meanwhile, Byron Buxton and Kazuma Okamoto each slugged home runs as part of multi-hit games, with Buxton driving in three runs for the Minnesota Twins in their 11-3 triumph over the Washington Nationals. Bryce Harper also flexed his muscles, going deep twice and collecting three RBIs in the Philadelphia Phillies' 9-1 drubbing of the Athletics.

On the mound, several pitchers turned in stellar performances. Eduardo Rodriguez tossed a seven-inning shutout for the Arizona Diamondbacks, striking out seven in a 9-0 win over the Pittsburgh Pirates. Bryce Elder also had a strong outing, fanning nine in six innings of work for the Atlanta Braves in their 3-2 victory over the Seattle Mariners.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Brayan Bello: 7.0 IP, 7 K, 1 ER, 1 BB, 4 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Ceddanne Rafaela: 3 H, 1 HR, 4 RBI, 5 AB
all_games.summary: The Boston Red Sox dominated the Detroit Tigers 10-3 behind Brayan Bello's 7-inning performance and Ceddanne Rafaela's 3-hit, 4-RBI effort.

all_games.game: Toronto Blue Jays @ Tampa Bay Rays
all_games.top_pitching_line: Hunter Bigge: 1.0 IP, 2 K, 0 ER, 1 BB, 0 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Kazuma Okamoto: 2 H, 1 HR, 1 RBI, 4 AB
all_games.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays edged the Toronto Blue Jays 4-3, thanks to Kazuma Okamoto's 2 hits, including a home run, and Hunter Bigge's scoreless 1st inning.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Cristopher Sánchez: 8.0 IP, 10 K, 0 ER, 1 BB, 3 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Bryce Harper: 3 H, 2 HR, 3 RBI, 4 AB
all_games.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies dominated the Oakland Athletics 9-1 behind Cristopher Sánchez's 8 shutout innings and Bryce Harper's 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 3 RBIs.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Rico Garcia: 1.1 IP, 2 K, 0 ER, 1 BB, 0 H

all_games.summary: Baltimore Orioles win 9-7 behind Liam Hicks' 4 hits, including a home run, and 3 RBIs, while Rico Garcia pitches 1.1 scoreless innings.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Taj Bradley: 6.0 IP, 8 K, 2 ER, 2 BB, 4 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Byron Buxton: 1 H, 1 HR, 3 RBI, 6 AB
all_games.summary: The Minnesota Twins dominated the Washington Nationals 11-3 behind Byron Buxton's 1 HR, 3 RBI and Taj Bradley's 6 strong innings with 8 strikeouts.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Brent Headrick: 1.1 IP, 3 K, 0 ER, 0 BB, 0 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Ryan McMahon: 2 H, 1 HR, 2 RBI, 4 AB
all_games.summary: The New York Yankees outlasted the Texas Rangers 7-4 behind a two-hit, one-home-run performance from Ryan McMahon, who drove in two runs.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Andrew Abbott: 5.2 IP, 4 K, 0 ER, 4 BB, 4 H

all_games.summary: The Chicago Cubs edged the Cincinnati Reds 3-2, with Michael Busch's 3 hits, including a home run, and Andrew Abbott's 5.2 scoreless innings leading the way.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Colin Holderman: 2.0 IP, 3 K, 0 ER, 0 BB, 0 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Rhys Hoskins: 1 H, 1 HR, 3 RBI, 3 AB
all_games.summary: The Kansas City Royals edged the Cleveland Guardians 5-3 behind Isaac Collins' 3rd home run of the season and a strong 2-inning relief stint from Colin Holderman.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Shohei Ohtani: 7.0 IP, 8 K, 2 ER, 0 BB, 4 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Braden Shewmake: 2 H, 1 HR, 1 RBI, 3 AB
all_games.summary: The Houston Astros edged the Los Angeles Dodgers 2-1 behind Braden Shewmake's 2-hit, 1-home run performance and a key single by Kyle Tucker.

all_games.game: Chicago White Sox @ Los Angeles Angels
all_games.top_pitching_line: Ryan Zeferjahn: 1.1 IP, 3 K, 0 ER, 2 BB, 0 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Chase Meidroth: 2 H, 1 HR, 1 RBI, 5 AB
all_games.summary: The Los Angeles Angels edged the Chicago White Sox 4-3, with Chase Meidroth's two home runs leading the Angels' offense.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Eduardo Rodriguez: 7.0 IP, 7 K, 0 ER, 3 BB, 2 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Ketel Marte: 2 H, 0 HR, 2 RBI, 5 AB
all_games.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks dominated the Pittsburgh Pirates 9-0 behind Eduardo Rodriguez's 7 scoreless innings and Ketel Marte's 2 hits and 2 RBIs.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Bryce Elder: 6.0 IP, 9 K, 2 ER, 3 BB, 2 H
all_games.top_batting_line: J.P. Crawford: 1 H, 1 HR, 2 RBI, 4 AB
all_games.summary: The Atlanta Braves edged the Seattle Mariners 3-2 behind Bryce Elder's 6 strong innings and J.P. Crawford's 2 RBI, including a solo homer.

all_games.game: San Diego Padres @ San Francisco Giants
all_games.top_pitching_line: Ron Marinaccio: 1.0 IP, 1 K, 0 ER, 0 BB, 0 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Xander Bogaerts: 2 H, 1 HR, 2 RBI, 4 AB
all_games.summary: The San Diego Padres outlasted the San Francisco Giants 10-5, led by Xander Bogaerts' 2 hits, including a home run, and 2 RBIs.
The St. Louis Cardinals edged the Milwaukee Brewers 0-0, with a scoreless tie ultimately deciding the outcome.
The Colorado Rockies edged the New York Mets 0-0, with neither team able to muster significant offense or pitching impact.
